channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: More torrential rain and flash flooding expected in heavily waterlogged South and Midwest
item.description: Another round of torrential rain and flash flooding was expected in parts of the South and Midwest already heavily waterlogged by days of relentless severe storms that in some cases spawned deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: George Walker Iv And Bruce Schreiner, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US consumers rush to buy big-ticket items before Trump's tariffs kick in
item.description: John Gutierrez had been thinking about buying a new laptop for the past year. The Austin, Texas, resident needed a computer with faster processing and increased storage for his photography work and had his sights set on a product from a Taiwanese brand.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH and MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In the race to save lives after the Myanmar quake, US rescuers are notable by their absence
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Day after day, Chinese rescue teams haul children and elderly people from collapsed buildings as cameras beam the thanks of grateful survivors around the world. Russian medical teams show off field hospitals erected in a flash to tend the wounded.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia bill would compensate the wrongfully convicted and let Trump recover costs of election case
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A revived attempt to fix Georgia's inefficient system for compensating people wrongfully convicted of crimes almost died.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE KRAMON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Las Vegas Sphere launching 'experience' around classic film
item.description: Sphere, the famed immersive Las Vegas entertainment arena, is set to debut two new "Sphere Experiences" later this year — and one is based on a beloved classic motion picture.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: YouTube daredevil arrested by Indian authorities after visiting remote island where US missionary was killed
item.description: A YouTube influencer visiting a remote Indian island, where he allegedly tried to make illegal contact with indigenous people, has been arrested, according to global reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate vote-a-rama on Trump budget bill kicks off
item.description: The Senate on Friday night kicked off its vote-a-rama, a process that is likely to conclude with Republicans adopting the budget resolution that will serve as a blueprint for enacting President Trump's domestic agenda.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Maya Angelou memoir, Holocaust book are among those pulled from Naval Academy library in DEI purge
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Books on the Holocaust, histories of feminism, civil rights and racism, and Maya Angelou's famous autobiography, “I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings,” were among the nearly 400 volumes removed from the U.S.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR and TARA COPP, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shopping spree? Consumers rush to buy goods ahead of Trump tariffs
item.description: President Trump's tariffs are expected to drive up prices, and some consumers are trying to get ahead of the action.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KTLA 5

item.title: Army may slash 90,000 troops as Pentagon faces budget cuts and strategic shake-up: report
item.description: Massive potential cuts within the U.S. Army, reported by Military.com, would lead to a "leaner, more lethal, and larger" combat force, an Army spokesperson told Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutors seek 7 years in prison for disgraced ex-US Rep. George Santos in federal fraud case
item.description: Prosecutors are seeking more than seven years in prison for disgraced former congressman George Santos after he pleaded guilty to federal fraud and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: China hit brakes on TikTok deal after Trump announced wide-ranging tariffs, AP source says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Friday said he is signing an executive order to keep TikTok running in the U.S. for another 75 days to give his administration more time to broker a deal to bring the social media platform under American ownership.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, AAMER MADHANI and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Actor Glen Powell launches organic condiments line
item.description: Actor and producer Glen Powell has launched Smash Kitchen, a line of organic condiments that includes non-GMO pantry essentials with remixed flavors, now exclusively available nationwide at Walmart stores and Walmart.com.
item.dc:creator: Erica Pauda, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-assistant says filmmaker Paul Schrader sexually assaulted her and backed out of settlement deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paul Schrader, the writer of “Taxi Driver” and director of “American Gigolo,” has been accused in a lawsuit of sexually assaulting his former personal assistant, firing her when she wouldn't acquiesce to advances and reneging on a settlement that was meant to keep the allegations con
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: JP Morgan predicts 2025 recession as Trump tariffs rattle market
item.description: President Trump's tariffs and their fallout will cause the U.S. economy to enter a recession this year, J.P. Morgan predicts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Medicare won't cover anti-obesity GLP-1 drugs as Biden admin proposed
item.description: In November last year, the Biden administration proposed a new rule that would allow drugs like Wegovy and Zepbound to be covered by Medicare and Medicaid, expanding access for roughly 3.4 million Medicare users and about 4 million Medicaid enrollees.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Anaheim mayor wants Los Angeles Angels to change their name
item.description: In an open-letter about the Angels future, the Anaheim mayor called for the team to be named for the city it actually represents.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 100-year-old tortoise gives birth to critically endangered hatchlings at Philly Zoo
item.description: For the first time in over 150 years, the Philadelphia Zoo has new additions to the Western Santa Cruz Galapagos tortoise family.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LA County reaches $4 billion agreement to settle sexual abuse claims at juvenile facilities
item.description: Officials say Los Angeles County has reached a $4 billion agreement to settle nearly 7,000 claims of sexual abuse in juvenile facilities since 1959.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant's past innovations.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fyre Festival II not happening at 2nd location, Mexican officials say
item.description: A major issue looms for the planned Fyre Festival II. A representative from Playa del Carmen's City Hall stated that the music festival is not scheduled to take place there. Just last week, Bill McFarland revealed that the festival was moved from Isla Mujeres to Playa del Carmen.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Viral video shows Florida charter captain arguing with boater; police investigating
item.description: A viral video showing a fight between two Florida boaters has sparked both a police investigation and strong reactions from people online.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CEO allegedly choked fellow cruise ship passenger over dance floor dispute: FBI
item.description: First American Financial CEO Kenneth DeGiorgio is facing federal charges after allegedly choking another passenger while on a Virgin Voyages cruise, according to the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASA astronaut reveals they nearly failed to dock Boeing Starliner to International Space Station
item.description: NASA astronaut Butch Wilmore revealed that the Boeing Starliner almost had to abort its attempt to dock to the International Space Station on June 5, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South and Midwest pounded by rains and floods while still reeling from tornadoes
item.description: Parts of the Midwest and South have been battered by torrential rains and life-threatening flash floods.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Sainz, George Walker Iv And John Seewer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump backs Luna push for House parental proxy voting
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) has been scrambling to break an impasse over the push for proxy voting, after Luna joined with more than 200 Democrats and nine Republicans to use a procedure known as a discharge petition to circumvent leadership and force a vote on the matter.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5

item.title: Unemployment benefits for striking workers being considered in Oregon, Washington
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Lawmakers in Oregon and Washington are considering whether striking workers should receive unemployment benefits, following recent walkouts by Boeing factory workers, hospital nurses and teachers in the Pacific Northwest that highlighted a new era of American labor activism.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE and CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Storms kill 7 in the South and Midwest as forecasters warn of catastrophic rains, floods this week
item.description: LAKE CITY, Ark. (AP) — Standing alongside the twisted steel tractors on his family farm in northeast Arkansas on Thursday, Danny Qualls looked on while friends and relatives helped him begin cleaning up.
item.dc:creator: ADRIAN SAINZ, GEORGE WALKER IV and JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump sued over China tariffs
item.description: It marks the first known legal challenge against Trump’s tariffs, which have fulfilled a campaign promise and rattled financial markets.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dog saved after falling over 100 feet at Colorado National Monument
item.description: What started as a dog owner's worst nightmare ended in a heartwarming reunion thanks in part to a multi-agency effort by Colorado responders.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Yankees OF Brett Gardner's son died of carbon monoxide poisoning, had 'layer' on organs, officials say
item.description: Randall Zúñiga, director of the Judicial Investigation Agency, said they tested the 14-year-old Miller Gardner for carboxyhemoglobin, a compound generated when carbon monoxide binds to hemoglobin in the blood.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Gravedigger arrested after baby's corpse found on West Virginia cemetery's grounds
item.description: A gravedigger at a Cabell County cemetery was arrested on Wednesday after a baby's corpse from 1982 and a busted casket were found at the Baylous Cemetery last week.
item.dc:creator: Isaac Taylor, Fox 5

item.title: Trump restoring millions in family planning funds for two states
item.description: The Trump administration is restoring millions of dollars in Title X funds to two states after the Biden administration chose to withhold those funds because the pair failed to comply with program rules.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Man accused of breaking in, snatching chicken from ex-girlfriend's home
item.description: A man was arrested over the weekend after he was accused of breaking into his ex-girlfriend's home and stealing her pet chicken.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC
